CustomField.description: Marker for B3 (Phase B holdings backfill) records. TRUE means this Holding was generated by FscHoldingsBackfill to fill out empty Investment FAs. Pre-existing 428 holdings stay FALSE.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscHoldingsBackfill. TRUE means this is generated demo-portfolio data; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Is Seeded Holding
